data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
text = data[0]['text']

for f in fields:
    fid = f.get\('fieldId',''\)
    name = f.get\('name',''\)
    required = f.get\('required', False\)
    if required or 'org' in fid.lower\(\) or 'org' in name.lower\(\) or fid == 'customfield_10107':
        print\(f'ID: {fid} | Name: {name} | Required: {required}'\)
        allowed = f.get\('allowedValues', []\)
        if allowed:
            for v in allowed[:5]:
                print\(f'  Value: {v}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/r.vivek/.claude/projects/-Users-r-vivek-Library-CloudStorage-OneDrive-EnnoventureINC-Documents-Product-OS/576fafe1-b9d1-4540-9cde-3d3e6a2a9da8/tool-results/mcp-claude_ai_Atlassian_Rovo-getJiraIssueTypeMetaWithFields-1775126111484.txt'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
text = data[0]['text']
obj = json.loads\(text\)
# obj might be a dict with 'fields' key
if isinstance\(obj, dict\):
    fields = obj.get\('fields', obj.get\('values', []\)\)
    print\('Keys:', list\(obj.keys\(\)\)[:10]\)
    for fid, fdata in \(fields.items\(\) if isinstance\(fields, dict\) else enumerate\(fields\)\):
        name = fdata.get\('name',''\) if isinstance\(fdata, dict\) else ''
        required = fdata.get\('required', False\) if isinstance\(fdata, dict\) else False
        if required or 'customfield_10107' in str\(fid\) or 'org' in str\(name\).lower\(\):
            print\(f'ID: {fid} | Name: {name} | Required: {required}'\)
            allowed = fdata.get\('allowedValues', []\) if isinstance\(fdata, dict\) else []
            for v in allowed[:3]:
                print\(f'  -> {v}'\)
")
